summary: Faction ending data layer PASS but UI/transition path BROKEN. EndRunScreen never shown in active path.

checks.evidence: merlin_reputation_system.gd:91 iterates all FACTIONS, appends if >= THRESHOLD_ENDING (80)
merlin_reputation_system.gd:93 — if value >= THRESHOLD_ENDING (strict >=, so 79 not included)

checks.check: EndRunScreen.tscn shown after run ends in active path
checks.evidence: walk_event_controller._check_run_end():385 only checks life<=0. No MOS, no victory. BroceliandeForest3D has no run_ended signal handler → EndRunScreen never shown.

checks.check: faction_ending_chosen signal emitted in active path
checks.evidence: end_run_screen.gd:23 defines signal faction_ending_chosen but EndRunScreen never instantiated in active path. Signal never emitted.
GameFlowController (scripts/core/game_flow_controller.gd) is the dead path (per PAT-S14-002). Even though wired internally, it's not connected to any active scene.

root_cause: walk_event_controller._check_run_end() (active path) does NOT call StoreRun.check_run_end(). It only emits run_ended on MerlinStore but BroceliandeForest3D doesn't listen. EndRunScreen.tscn is never loaded.
